name: nattpass-orkester
description: Weekly readonly orkester night pass — report only, no deploy

prompts:
Readonly nattpass for Livskompassen.

1. Run npm run orkester:night (or document if shell unavailable).
2. On FAIL: write docs/evaluations/YYYY-MM-DD-orkester-natt.md with one fix step.
3. On PASS: brief summary only.

MUST NOT: firebase deploy, merge to main, modify firestore.rules or sharedRules.ts.
